focus: Commit and push implicit await run scope guard

decisions.text: Responder ao usuário em português conforme preferência global registrada.
Refresh init and side-panel scaffolds as docs/context-only slice after offline /init reported no file writes.
Do not promote lib-bins as a mandatory gate yet; local serial measurement hit the 600s Jcode supervision timeout while tests were still passing.
Issue #1 first slice (`jcode-harness safe-eval`) is already present in current source and e2e coverage; validated locally and aligned selfdev jcode-harness binary before moving to next issue.

For issue #2, implement a deterministic manifest-only `jcode-harness demo` first, rather than auto-running demos, so README/product claims are reproducible without triggering project writes, providers, network, MCP, browser, or credentials by default.

For `demo run`, block manifest entries with `project_writes=true` by default and only run them with explicit `--allow-writes`, so issue #2 demos stay reproducible without accidental workspace mutation.
Use `--sandbox` as the preferred way to execute project-writing demos: it permits reproducible evidence while keeping the requested repository clean and deleting the temporary workspace by default.
Expose `jcode-harness session list --json` as the first issue #4 headless runtime slice: read-only/offline session metadata now, while mutable spawn/attach/resume APIs remain follow-up work.

Expose `jcode-harness session show <id> --json` as a local-session-only, read-only headless metadata API with transcript preview opt-in via bounded `--preview N`, keeping external imported session show semantics for later source-specific slices.
Completed issue #13 safety slice add working_dir metadata to AgentInfo, swarm list formatting, and cleanup dry-run labels without changing live cleanup behavior.

Completed issue #13 observability slice: structured swarm events now carry member run_id, role, status, and working_dir metadata when recorded for known members, and debug recent/since/subscribe expose those fields additively.

Completed issue #13 UX slice: default swarm list output now summarizes run groups, including mixed run IDs and unscoped legacy members, with a scoped-list hint while preserving scoped run output behavior.

Completed issue #13 idempotency slice: explicit operation_id now deduplicates swarm message/dm/channel fanout by replaying prior Done/Error through swarm mutation state without changing default messages.

Completed issue #13 stop idempotency slice: stop now replays persisted final responses before target lookup and begins mutation before emitting close/removal side effects, preventing duplicate close requests on retry.

Completed issue #13 resolved stop identity slice: live stop mutations now use resolved target session IDs, preserving exact-ID replay while preventing reused aliases from replaying stale stop results.
Completed issue #13 spawn idempotency follow-up: explicit operation_id/request_nonce spawn keys now ignore generated run_id drift, preserving default non-operation-id spawn key specificity.

Completed issue #13 await scoping guard: implicit await_members now infers a sole active owned run_id or errors with an explicit-scope hint when multiple active owned runs are present, while preserving explicit scopes and no-run fallback.
